mnemonics: S.C.H.A.N.G: S - Start with the user, C - Context is crucial, H - Humans in the loop, A - Assess impact, N - Navigate ethics, G - Guard against bias
keyPoints: AI systems must be designed with a deep understanding of the human context they will operate in.
Emphasizes the importance of keeping humans in the loop for oversight and control.
Focuses on assessing and mitigating the real-world societal impact and potential biases of AI systems.
commonMistakes: Designing AI in a vacuum without real-world user context or feedback.
Fully automating systems and removing necessary human oversight and intervention points.
Focusing solely on technical performance metrics while ignoring broader ethical implications and societal harm.
